headline: Will Cummins (CMI) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Cummins (CMI) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Cummins (CMI) Upgraded to Buy: Here's What You Should Know
summary: Cummins (CMI) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

headline: AI Data Centers Fuel Cummins: Buy CMI Stock on Dividend Hike?
summary: Cummins' 10% dividend hike, surging AI data center power demand and raised 2030 targets reinforce its appeal as a compelling long-term buy.

headline: Before The Surge, CAT Stock Was Sending A Power-Grid Sized Signal
summary: While the market was focused on its slowing construction business, one of Caterpillar’s divisions was quietly building a record-breaking order book that hinted at the rally to come.

raw.headline: Before The Surge, CAT Stock Was Sending A Power-Grid Sized Signal

headline: Here's What to Expect From Cummins’ Next Earnings Report
summary: Cummins is scheduled to report its second-quarter earnings next month, and Wall Street analysts are forecasting a low-double-digit year-over-year increase in its profitability.
